gameSubtitle:
Match gems and
clear the board!
howToPlayGoalDesc: Match 3 or more identical gems in a row or column to clear them and earn points.
howToPlayMatchDesc: Three identical gems lined up make a match! The gems inside the border are matched.
howToPlaySwapDesc: Swap adjacent gems by tap-tap or swipe. If no match is made, the gems swap back.
howToPlayComboDesc: When new gems fall and create chain matches, that's a combo! Higher combos earn more points.
howToPlaySpecialDesc: Special gems now follow Bejeweled-style rules. A 4-in-a-row makes a Flame Gem, a T or L shape makes a Star Gem, a 5-in-a-row makes a Hypercube, and 6 or more in a row makes a Supernova Gem. Special gems activate when matched or swapped with a normal gem.
howToPlaySpecialStarDesc: Clears its full row and column in a cross.
howToPlaySpecialHyperDesc: Swap it with a gem to clear every gem of that color.
howToPlaySpecialSupernovaDesc: Combines a 3x3 blast with row and column clearing.
howToPlaySpecialMakeFlame: Match 4 identical gems in a row to create a Flame Gem.
howToPlaySpecialMakeStar: Match a T or L shape to create a Star Gem.
howToPlaySpecialMakeHyper: Match 5 identical gems to create a hyper gem.
howToPlaySpecialMakeSupernova: Match 6 or more identical gems in a row to create a Supernova Gem.
howToPlayHintDesc: Stuck? Tap the light bulb button to highlight a swappable pair.
